context: The agent was asked to triage a PR review comment about missing resource limits on a Kubernetes container, classify it, produce corrected YAML, and write a review reply.

checklist.name: correct_classification
checklist.description: Classifies the comment as ACTIONABLE_FIX — missing resource limits is a real safety issue that must be fixed

checklist.name: correct_yaml
checklist.description: Provides corrected YAML with resources.requests (cpu + memory) and resources.limits (memory). CPU limit is omitted or justified — CPU limits cause throttling.

checklist.name: blast_radius
checklist.description: States blast radius: rolling update replaces pods; if requests exceed actual usage, pods may be rescheduled

checklist.name: rollback_plan
checklist.description: Provides a rollback plan: revert manifest and re-apply, or kubectl rollout undo

checklist.name: reply_quality
checklist.description: Review reply is concise and references the specific file (`apps/api/deployment.yaml`) and/or the specific change made (resource requests/limits added)
